name: Baked Stuffed Vidalia Onions
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup grape juice or white wine
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the onions and slice off the tops, leaving about a 1/2-inch shell. Reserve the onion centers.
2. Place the shells in a steamer basket and steam for 6 minutes after the water has come to a boil.
3. Measure 1/2 cup of the reserved onion pieces and finely chop them. In a small skillet, heat the oil and sauté the onions until soft.
4. Stir together TVP® flakes and hot water. Add seasonings and mix well. Combine with the cooked onions and breadcrumbs. Place the hollowed-out onion shells in a baking dish. Spoon the filling into the shells. Any remaining filling that won't fit into the shells can be placed around them.
5. Bake uncovered at 375°F for 30 to 35 minutes. Let stand for 5 minutes before serving.
